item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response immediately brakes the requested additional verifier, explicitly rejects making an入口核验人 a standing role, frames any check as one-time emergency-only, and moves upstream to root cause in numbering rules, system validation, templates, and ownership. It proposes structural fixes such as system required fields, format validation, auto-generation, and master-data constraints. Although it does not enumerate all three prior manual gates in detail, it clearly recognizes the repeated 'error -> add a role' spiral and satisfies the anti-spiral triage behavior."}
